title: Yijing Hexagram 17: Sui (Following)
description: Hexagram 17 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 17 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Following has supreme success. Perseverance furthers. No blame. Thunder in the middle of the lake.
